Codex里面已经可以直接使用 GPT-Image 2 画图了，不需要配置任何 API Key，直接出图，比 nano banana pro 效果还好！

可以搭配baoyu-skills里面的画图技能使用：
- baoyu-infographic 信息图
- baoyu-comic 漫画图片
- baoyu-article-illustrator 为文章添加插图
- baoyu-image-cards https://t.co/YbkoVsZGNb

为啥我的不能抓取天气，这张就明显抓取成功了

https://t.co/uLOlknNr7d

GPT Image 2 Prompt：3D chibi-style miniature concept store

----

3D chibi-style miniature concept store of {Brand Name}, creatively designed with an exterior inspired by the brand's most iconic product or packaging (such as a giant {brand's core product, e.g., chicken https://t.co/ACdkBfpMwo

GPT Image 2 Prompt：Isometric Miniature Stock Scene

Enter a company name or stock ticker to generate an exquisite, miniature isometric 3D scene integrating real-time stock data for the specified date.

--- Prompt ---

Present an exquisite, miniature 3D cartoon-style scene of the https://t.co/6Q0sWISag1
RT @learn2vibe: We have achieved image AGI

香蕉不香了，GPT Image 2 杀死了比赛
亲自用过之后才能感受到那种震撼

提示词也变得从未无比简单：
第一轮：https://t.co/DuylNtMLOE 从这个网站以及网络获取这个产品的信息，并生成能打动用户的宣传海报
第二轮：太美了，参考电影 her 的配色吧
第三轮：wow 太酷了，再用 银翼杀手2049 joi https://t.co/xDU4LMmhto

同样提示词下，香蕉的表现是这样的：
像是上个时代的东西。。。 https://t.co/miF6iGysmi

GPT Images 2.0 的宣传片
全部素材都是自己生成
这是最有创意的图片模型宣传片
https://t.co/ob7FfN3EJ4

Sam Altman 对 GPT images 2.0 的评价：
这次升级相当于 GPT 3 直接飞跃到 GPT 5

GPT-Image-2 is out!
 
I asked it to generate a screenshot of Photoshop in 90s. 
I'm very impressed 

Which version of Photoshop was your first? https://t.co/jX7NTEMSwg

GPT Image 2 Prompt：Kids’ Crayon Travel Journal Illustration Prompt

This prompt generates a vibrant, child-like crayon-style vertical (9:16) travel-journal illustration for a {City Name} trip, automatically creating a winding route with daily recommended attractions, cute https://t.co/YNuFVnJopP

Anthropic 悄悄在定价页面上把 Claude Code 从 20 美元的 Pro 套餐中移除了，没有发任何公告。

有人发现 https://t.co/7JG4DUXhn6 的功能对比表里，Pro 套餐对应的 Claude Code 一栏变成了叉号。与此同时，多篇帮助文档也已经删掉了"Pro 套餐包含 Claude Code"的表述，老版本在 Wayback Machine https://t.co/tj2AUWZSbg

My most popular AI post was a bunch of made-up "graphs" four years ago. Now, the new GPT-2 image generator does it for real (though not perfect)

Here's the famous AI task horizons graph with a touch of Basquiat, haunted by ghosts, from the Voynich manuscript, as a decaying pier. https://t.co/DY5UacOcQh
OMG Space X is acquiring Cursor (Kinda)

The battle for the SuperApp:
> SpaceX + Cursor
> Meta + Manus
> OpenAI Codex
> Claude Desktop
> Google Something...

GPT Image 2 的 API 价格低得离谱
比 banana 便宜很多就不说了
它甚至比上一代 GPT Image 都便宜
OpenAI 这是在做慈善啊 https://t.co/NCUWyZ5xUW

Opus 4.7 这个升级确实是有点失败
应该是新tokenizer下的第一个尝试
看 4.8 的表现吧
其他家也赶紧追一追

语言发生意义的时刻，是发生在语言和世界交互的时刻。

维特根斯坦也后来推翻了自己。

Are you team Anthropic, team DeepMind, team xAI or team OpenAI?

P.S.: you can be on several teams 😅 https://t.co/RJc0mS762s
